about.title: About Us
about.description: IKH MARGAD CLINIC - Specialized Gastroenterology Clinic
about.aboutText: IKH MARGAD Clinic is specialized in digestive system diagnostics and treatment. We accurately diagnose diseases at early stages and provide evidence-based comprehensive treatment.
about.missionText: We work to protect everyone's health and quality of life by early detection, accurate diagnosis, and effective treatment of digestive system diseases.
about.visionText: To become a benchmark clinic that meets international standards by developing diagnostic and treatment methods suited to Mongolian characteristics based on advanced technology.
about.feature1Desc: Treating every patient with care and compassion

services.title: Services
services.service1Desc: Complete examination of stomach, intestines, esophagus, and colon
services.service3Desc: Detailed blood, biochemistry, and virus testing
services.service4Desc: Ultrasound examination of stomach, liver, and gallbladder
services.service5Desc: Diagnosis and treatment of digestive diseases
